Our Approach

Built for owners.
Loved by guests.

The Serene Method

A smarter way to
own Greek property

The Serene Method is our proprietary framework for creating residences that generate predictable passive income with zero operational burden on the owner.

We design each project from the ground up with hospitality DNA — architecture, interior detailing, amenity programming, and digital presence are all built to attract premium guests and justify premium rates.

8–12%Net Annual Yield
92%Avg Occupancy
4.95★Guest Rating
€250KGolden Visa
Beyond the numbers

This is not just an investment.
It is a lifestyle you own.

Most investments ask you to give up your money and wait. Serene asks you to give up nothing — and gain everything.

🏡

A home you can actually use

As a Serene owner, you have the right to stay in your villa whenever you choose. Arrive to a fully prepared, hotel-standard residence in one of Greece's most beautiful locations — ready for you and your family, at any time of year.

🛎

Managed 24/7, 365 days a year

Our in-house hospitality team manages your property around the clock — guest check-ins, housekeeping, maintenance, pricing, reviews. You receive income. You receive reports. You do nothing. The Serene brand is your management company.

🌊

Luxury you experience, not just own

Stay at your villa and you experience the exact same premium hospitality your guests do — private pool, design interiors, Sahara Beach Club at your doorstep, and the full Serene service. Your investment pays you back in ways a bank account never could.

📊

Numbers that still work

While you enjoy the lifestyle benefit, the property earns €15,000+ net per year in rental income, appreciates 12–18% annually, and builds long-term equity. The lifestyle is the bonus. The return is the foundation.

"
You are not buying a line on a spreadsheet. You are buying a place in the world — one that works for you financially while giving you the kind of holiday your family deserves.
01

Developer-Built Quality

We are the developer — no middleman. Every residence is built to Serene specifications, ensuring consistent design, material, and build standards across all projects.

02

Full Hospitality Management

Our in-house Serene brand team manages pricing, bookings, guest experience, and maintenance — end to end. You own, we operate.

03

Transparent Yield Sharing

Monthly revenue reports, direct bank transfers, and a clear management fee structure. You are always in control and in the know.

04

Appreciating Asset

Greek real estate has risen 12–18% year-on-year. Your Serene property combines rental income with long-term capital growth in one of Europe's fastest-growing markets.

05

Personal Use — Live the Serene Experience

Your investment is more than financial. As a Serene owner, you have the right to use your property personally — stay in it, host family, experience our hospitality from the inside. You don't just invest in a lifestyle brand; you live it. This is an investment that pays you back in ways money can't measure.

✦ Owner Privilege

The Location

550km of coastline, 300 sun days annually, 60 min from Thessaloniki Airport. One of northern Greece's fastest-appreciating markets.

The Investment

Buy off-plan at developer pricing. Comparable properties appreciated 15–25% by handover. Rental income starts immediately after operation launch.

▶ Location Video

The project site & Sahara Beach Club

See exactly where Serene Dunes sits — and what's at your doorstep

📍

A location that simply cannot be replicated.

Nea Iraklia, Halkidiki · steps from one of Greece's most celebrated beaches

<100m To the beach Walk out the door — you're already there
Adjacent Sahara Beach Resort Halkidiki's most prestigious beach club — at your doorstep
30 min Thessaloniki Greece's second city — culture, dining, nightlife
25 min Airport Macedonia International — direct European routes
15 min Waterpark Perfect for families — a day trip, not a journey
1 hr The Fingers Sithonia & Kassandra — world-class nature & beaches
5 min Kallikratia Town Authentic Greek tavernas — dinner with the locals
∞ Thermaic Gulf Views A horizon you will never tire of
🏖

Sahara Beach Resort — Halkidiki's crown jewel

Direct access to the most exclusive beach resort in northern Greece. VIP sunbeds, crystal-clear waters, world-class DJ events and fine dining — right outside your villa. This is not a proximity advantage. It is a lifestyle privilege.

↑ NORTH

  • ✈️ Airport — 25 min
  • 🏙 Thessaloniki City — 30 min
  • 🌊 Waterpark — 15 min
  • 🛍 Shopping malls & services

↓ SOUTH

  • 🏔 Mount Athos viewpoints — 1 hr
  • 🐠 Sithonia crystal beaches — 1 hr
  • 🍷 Kassandra villages & vineyards
  • 🌙 Kallikratia tavernas — 5 min
🗺️

Apartment Specification

StructureReinforced concrete · Seismic grade
FaçadeInsulated render · Timber louvre screens
Flooring60×60 cm porcelain tile throughout
WindowsDouble-glazed aluminium frames · Low-E glass
KitchenEngineered stone worktops · Integrated appliances
BathroomsItalian porcelain · Rain shower · Heated towel rail
HVACInverter A/C + ceiling fan in each room
PoolPrivate plunge pool · Saltwater system · LED lighting
OutdoorTimber decking · Lounge & dining furniture

What's Included in the Price

✓Fully furnished & equipped — move-in ready
✓All white goods & kitchen appliances
✓Private pool installation & landscaping
✓Parking space
✓Legal & notary fees (buyer's side)
✓Property registration & title deed
✓Serene property management onboarding
✓12-month defects warranty
✕Annual property tax (paid by owner, ~€200–400/yr)
✕Management fee (deducted from rental income)
